verse_text: The children of Israel also killed with the sword Balaam the son of Beor, the soothsayer, among those who were killed by them.

links.context: False teachers are condemned for both their words and their actions. Those who are natural cannot understand spiritual things ([[1CO.2:14]]) and will be destroyed, as false prophets have been in the past. For the story of Balaam (v. 15), see [[NUM.22:1]]-25:9; 31:8, 16; [[DEU.23:4]], [[DEU.23:5]]; [[JOS.13:22]]; Jude 11.

Balaam taught Balak "to put a stumbling block before the children of Israel, to eat things sacrificed to idols" ([[REV.2:14]]; see [[NUM.31:16]]). Soon afterward, the Israelites killed Balaam with the sword when they killed the kings of Midian (31:8; [[JOS.13:22]]).
